title: Grilled Pork Skewers with Hoisin Glaze
description: A sweet and savory Chinese-inspired dish featuring pork skewers grilled to perfection and served with a sticky hoisin glaze.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together honey, soy sauce, and rice vinegar.
Thread pork cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush skewers with honey mixture and season with salt and pepper.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, cook bacon in a pan over medium heat until crispy.
In a small bowl, mix together crumbled bacon and chopped olives.
Brush skewers with remaining honey mixture and serve with bacon mixture on top.
Optional: serve with steamed vegetables or rice.
